subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Send down upon this suppliant who seeketh shelter at the threshold of Thy oneness, from the outpourings of heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربنا أنزل علی هذا المستجير بفناء باب احديتک من فيوضات سماء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
